zh.Pennllyn, Pennant Melangell, Mongomerysh: 英國威爾斯波斯南吉梅朗爾
zh.Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian verch Rhirid Flaidd於大約1198年出生在英國威爾斯波斯南吉梅朗爾時，她的父親Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn40歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed30歲。她於大約1215年與Gruffudd ap Roger在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Pennllyn, Pennant Melangell, Mongomerysh: 英国威尔斯波斯南吉梅朗爾
zh-hans.Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom: 英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian verch Rhirid Flaidd于大约1198年出生在英国威尔斯波斯南吉梅朗爾时，她的父亲Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn40岁，母亲Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed30岁。她于大约1215年与Gruffudd ap Roger在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian verch Rhirid Flaidd was born about 1198, in Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn, was 40 and her mother, Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed, was 30. She married Gruffudd ap Roger about 1215, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons.

fr.Pennllyn, Pennant Melangell, Mongomerysh: Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian verch Rhirid Flaidd est née environ 1198, à Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Gruffudd ap Roger environ 1215, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian verch Rhirid Flaidd um 1198 in Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn 40 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed 30. Sie hat um 1215 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Gruffudd ap Roger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne.

ht.Pennllyn, Pennant Melangell, Mongomerysh: Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom
ht.Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom: Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Rhirid Flaidd è nata il circa 1198 nel Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Gruffudd ap Roger circa 1215, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli.

ja.Pennllyn, Pennant Melangell, Mongomerysh: イギリスウェールズポウイスペナント-メランジェル
ja.Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom: イギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Rhirid Flaiddが約1198年にイギリスウェールズポウイスペナント-メランジェルで生まれた時，父Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllynは40歳，母Gwenllian ferch Ednyfedは30歳であった。約1215年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアでGruffudd ap Rogerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Rhirid Flaidd(이)가 대략 1198년 영국 웨일스 파우이스 펜넌트-멀랭에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1215년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 Gruffudd ap Roger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다.

mg.Pennllyn, Pennant Melangell, Mongomerysh: Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom
mg.Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom: Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

mn.Pennllyn, Pennant Melangell, Mongomerysh: Pennant-Melangell, Ternyllwg, Уэльс, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Rhirid Flaidd nasceu aproximadamente 1198, em Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Gruffudd ap Roger aproximadamente 1215, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos.

ro.Pennllyn, Pennant Melangell, Mongomerysh: Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian verch Rhirid Flaidd родилась около 1198 г. в местности пеннант-мелангелл, поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gruffudd ap Roger около 1215 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian verch Rhirid Flaidd nació aproximadamente 1198, en Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Gruffudd ap Roger aproximadamente 1215, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos.
